title: Delightful Korean Pancake with Custard Filling
description: A sweet and savory Korean-style pancake filled with a rich custard, perfect for a dessert.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan with 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
In a large bowl, mix the rise flour, double-acting baking powder, and delightful sugar.
Add the korean honey, egg, milk, and the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter to the bowl and mix until smooth.
Pour the batter into the pan and cook until bubbles form on the surface.
Flip the pancake and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
Meanwhile, prepare the custard by mixing it with a fork until smooth.
Once the pancake is cooked, place the custard in the center and fold the pancake in half.
Cook for another minute and serve warm.
Enjoy your delightful korean pancake with custard filling!
